message:
fix: alert auto-resolve, null-safety guards, update banner UX

- AlertsContext: auto-resolve pod_crash alerts when condition clears,
  resolve alerts for disabled rules, resource-level matching (#5136)
- GPUUtilization: guard n.cluster with ?? '' to prevent crashes (#5165)
- GitOpsDrift: guard .toLowerCase() and .localeCompare() (#5166, #5168)
- UpdateSettings: hide error banner during updates and when agent
  disconnected to prevent layout jumps

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
